title: National Minimum Wage and National Living Wage: Low Pay Commission remit 2025
body: "The government has published a new remit to the Low Pay Commission (LPC). The new remit asks the LPC to make recommendations for the National Living Wage rate and National Minimum Wage rates that should apply from April 2026.  We have asked the LPC to make these recommendations by October 2025.  "

taxons.title: Your pay, tax and the National Minimum Wage
